violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in the hood system need to be cleaned.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop was stored on the ice machine and not in the container.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in the kitchen area is missing ceiling tiles. Metal is coming off the wall by the grill.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
